mapper.select: SELECT km.id, km.tenant_code, km.app_id, km.msg_type, km.from_user, u1.nickname from_user_nickname, km.to_user, u2.nickname to_user_nickname, km.content, km.msg_id, km.msg_time, km.sort, km.create_time, km.create_by, km.update_time, km.update_by, km.remark, km.version FROM wxmp_kf_msg km LEFT JOIN wxmp_user u1 ON u1.open_id = km.from_user AND u1.`status` = 1 LEFT JOIN wxmp_user u2 ON u2.open_id = km.to_user AND u2.`status` = 1 WHERE km.`status` = 1 AND km.create_time >= #{timeFrom} AND km.create_time <= #{timeTo} AND km.tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND km.app_id = #{appId} AND km.msg_type = #{msgType} AND km.from_user = #{fromUser} AND km.to_user = #{toUser} AND km.msg_id = #{msgId} ORDER BY km.id DESC
